title: naver/anny GitHub Repository
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for permissively licensed parametric human generation.
claims_supported: Anny is a differentiable human body mesh model written in PyTorch.
Anny models body shapes from infants to elders using a common topology and parameter space.
Anny code is licensed under Apache-2.0 and uses adapted MPFB2 assets licensed CC0.
claims_not_supported: That Anny is already optimized for Quest 3 runtime use without a separate export, rigging, and optimization pipeline.
That Anny alone supplies clothing, clinical equipment, or animation behavior.
